title: E2E integration tests for the full web console
analysis:
This task creates tests/test_web_e2e.py with comprehensive integration tests verifying end-to-end web console workflows. All tested routes and implementations already exist — this is a test-only task. No production code changes are needed.

Key codebase observations:
- App factory: create_app(db_path) in autopilot/web/app.py registers 5 routers (dashboard, gates, media, review, sse) + /api/health
- Test pattern: file-backed DB via tmp_path, CatalogDB(db_path), create_app(db_path), TestClient(app)
- Seeding: CatalogDB provides insert_media, insert_run, insert_job, insert_event, init_default_gates, update_gate, insert_narrative, insert_activity_cluster, upsert_edit_plan, upsert_narrative_script, insert_upload
- SSE tests use _event_generator patching pattern with finite generators (see test_sse.py)
- HTMX-aware routes return HTML partials when HX-Request header is present
- 9 pipeline stages: ingest, analyze, classify, narrate, script, edl, source, render, upload

Route availability vs task description:
- Items 1-7 (startup, dashboard, SSE, gates, media, narratives, clusters): All routes exist
- Item 8 (script review): No /review/scripts/{id} — scripts shown via /review/render/{id} which loads narrative_scripts
- Item 9 (EDL + timeline): No /review/edl/{id} — EDL validation shown via /review/render/{id}
- Item 10 (job management): No /api/jobs/{id}/retry or /skip routes exist — test job status via /api/stages
- Item 11 (full simulation): Achievable through gate workflow across all stages

The plan adapts items 8-10 to match actual routes while preserving coverage intent.

prerequisites.description: Create tests/test_web_e2e.py with file skeleton: imports (pytest, json, Path, FastAPI, TestClient, CatalogDB, create_app), module docstring, and PIPELINE_STAGES constant tuple.

Write shared fixture functions: e2e_db_path(tmp_path) returning str path, e2e_db(e2e_db_path) creating CatalogDB with autocommit, e2e_app(e2e_db_path) calling create_app, e2e_client(e2e_app) returning TestClient. Also write _parse_sse_body(text) helper to parse SSE wire format into list of dicts with id/event/data keys.

Write DB seeding helper functions: _seed_media(db, media_id, **overrides) with sensible defaults for file_path/codec/resolution/fps/duration/status; _seed_narrative(db, narrative_id, **overrides) with title/description/duration/cluster_ids/arc/journey/status defaults; _seed_cluster(db, cluster_id, **overrides) with label/description/time/location/clip_ids defaults; _seed_pipeline(db) that calls init_default_gates, inserts a running pipeline_run, and populates jobs across multiple stages with mixed statuses.

steps.description: Write TestAppStartup class: test_health_returns_200_ok (GET /api/health returns 200 with {status: ok}), test_root_redirects_to_dashboard (GET / returns 302/307 to /dashboard), test_static_files_mounted (GET /static/app.css returns 200).
Verify TestAppStartup passes against base e2e_client fixture with no seeding needed. These tests only need the app to be created, not seeded.

Write TestDashboardRendering class: test_dashboard_returns_html (GET /dashboard returns 200 text/html), test_dashboard_contains_all_9_stages (HTML contains all stage names from PIPELINE_STAGES), test_stage_cards_show_status (seeded DB with jobs shows running/error/done status in cards), test_stage_cards_show_progress (ingest card shows done/total like '5/7'), test_api_stages_returns_9_objects (GET /api/stages returns list of 9 with name/status_counts/gate_mode).

Write dashboard_seeded_db fixture that calls _seed_pipeline(db) to populate a running pipeline run with jobs in multiple stages (5 done + 2 running ingest, 1 running + 2 pending analyze, 1 error classify), default gates with analyze set to 'pause', and error events. Create dashboard_app and dashboard_client fixtures chained from it.

Write TestSSEEventFlow class: test_sse_endpoint_returns_event_stream (GET /api/events returns 200 with text/event-stream content-type, using _event_generator patch to yield finite events), test_events_delivered_in_order (insert 3 events, verify delivery order matches), test_event_has_id_event_data_fields (each SSE event has id/event/data), test_last_event_id_resumes (connect with Last-Event-ID:3 header, verify only events after ID 3 arrive), test_invalid_last_event_id_gets_all (non-numeric ID falls back to 0).

Write _finite_sse_generator(request) helper that patches autopilot.web.routes.sse._event_generator with a generator yielding DB events then stopping. Add SSE-specific fixtures: sse_db(e2e_db_path) and sse_app(sse_db) for SSE tests needing direct DB access for event insertion before stream read.

Write TestGateWorkflow class: test_get_gates_returns_9_gates (GET /api/gates returns list of 9 gates with default modes), test_get_single_gate (GET /api/gates/narrate returns gate dict), test_update_gate_mode (PUT /api/gates/narrate with mode='pause' persists), test_approve_gate (POST /api/gates/narrate/approve sets status to 'approved'), test_skip_gate (POST /api/gates/narrate/skip sets status to 'skipped'), test_apply_preset_review_creative (PUT /api/gates/preset/review_creative sets narrate+script+upload to pause), test_apply_preset_full_auto (all gates auto after preset).

Write gates_app and gates_client fixtures that create app with init_default_gates() called. Ensure gate tests set up waiting status where needed before approve/skip. Verify all 7 gate workflow tests pass.

Write TestMediaBrowsing class: test_media_list_page_returns_html (GET /media returns 200 HTML), test_media_api_returns_paginated (GET /api/media returns items+total), test_media_filter_by_status (GET /api/media?status=analyzed returns only matching), test_media_search_by_name (GET /api/media?q=video_3 returns matching), test_media_detail_page (GET /media/{id} returns 200 HTML with media info), test_media_detail_api (GET /api/media/{id} returns JSON with media/transcript/detections/faces/audio_events/embedding_count keys), test_media_tab_transcript (GET /media/{id}/tab/transcript returns HTML with segment times).

Write media_seeded_app fixture: seed 12 media files with varying statuses (pending/analyzed/ingested), insert transcripts for 3 media, batch_insert_detections for 2, batch_insert_faces for 1, batch_insert_embeddings for 2, batch_insert_audio_events for 1. Create media_client from it. Verify all 7 media browsing tests pass.

Write TestNarrativeReview class: test_review_hub_returns_html (GET /review returns 200 HTML), test_review_hub_shows_waiting_gate (with narrate gate waiting, page shows 'narrate'), test_list_narratives_api (GET /api/narratives returns list), test_filter_narratives_by_status (GET /api/narratives?status=proposed returns only proposed), test_approve_narrative (POST /api/narratives/{id}/approve sets status=approved), test_reject_narrative (POST /api/narratives/{id}/reject sets status=rejected), test_narratives_page_shows_titles (GET /review/narratives shows all narrative titles).

Write narrative_seeded_app fixture: init_default_gates, update_gate('narrate', status='waiting'), seed 3 narratives (2 proposed, 1 approved). Create narrative_client. Verify all 7 narrative review tests pass.

Write TestClusterReview class: test_clusters_page_shows_cards (GET /review/clusters shows cluster labels), test_list_clusters_api (GET /api/clusters returns list with clip_ids+clip_count), test_relabel_cluster (POST /api/clusters/{id}/relabel with label+description updates and persists), test_exclude_cluster (POST /api/clusters/{id}/exclude sets excluded=1), test_merge_clusters (POST /api/clusters/merge with 2 cluster_ids combines clips, extends time range, deletes smaller cluster).
Write cluster_seeded_app fixture: seed 3 activity clusters with different labels, clip_ids, and time ranges. Create cluster_client. Verify all 5 cluster review tests pass.

Write TestRenderScriptReview class: test_render_review_index (GET /review/render returns 200 HTML listing narratives with edit plans), test_render_detail_shows_validation (GET /review/render/{id} shows validation results like resolution/codec), test_render_detail_shows_script_scenes (page contains scene data from narrative_scripts), test_render_api_returns_json (GET /api/renders/{id} returns narrative_id + validation dict + render_path), test_render_video_returns_mp4 (GET /api/renders/{id}/video returns video/mp4 when file exists), test_uploads_page (GET /review/uploads shows upload data with YouTube URL).

Write render_seeded_app fixture: seed narrative, upsert_edit_plan with edl_json+validation_json+render_path pointing to a tmp_path file, upsert_narrative_script with script_json containing scenes, insert_upload with youtube_url. Create actual mp4 file at render_path. Create render_client. Verify all 6 render/script review tests pass.

Write TestJobStatus class: test_stages_api_shows_job_counts (GET /api/stages includes status_counts for stages with jobs), test_stage_card_reflects_error_jobs (stage with error jobs shows error status), test_stage_card_reflects_running_jobs (stage with running jobs shows running status). These verify job management visibility through the dashboard API.
Reuse dashboard_client fixture (which has mixed job statuses across stages). Verify all 3 job status tests pass by asserting on /api/stages response data.

Write TestFullPipelineSimulation class: test_complete_gate_workflow — seed a minimal pipeline run with all stages, set all gates to 'pause' via PUT /api/gates/preset/review_everything, update gates to 'waiting' in DB, walk through approving each of the 9 gates via POST /api/gates/{stage}/approve, verify each gate status becomes 'approved' via GET /api/gates/{stage}, and at the end verify all 9 gates show 'approved' via GET /api/gates.

Write pipeline_simulation_app fixture: init_default_gates, insert pipeline run, insert at least one job per stage. Create pipeline_client. Verify the full pipeline simulation test passes end-to-end — the test exercises the complete gate approval workflow across all 9 stages in sequence.

design_decisions.decision: Create a single test_web_e2e.py file rather than adding to existing per-route test files
design_decisions.rationale: The task explicitly asks for E2E integration tests that verify cross-cutting workflows. Existing test files (test_dashboard.py, test_gates.py, etc.) have thorough unit-level coverage of individual endpoints. The E2E file focuses on multi-step workflows and data consistency across views, avoiding duplication.

design_decisions.decision: Use separate fixture chains per test class rather than one massive shared fixture
design_decisions.rationale: Each test class needs different data combinations. A single fixture seeding everything would be fragile and hard to maintain. Separate fixtures (dashboard_seeded_app, media_seeded_app, etc.) keep seeding isolated and test failures localized.

design_decisions.decision: Adapt task items 8-10 to match actual routes instead of testing nonexistent endpoints
design_decisions.rationale: The task description mentions /review/scripts/{id}, /review/edl/{id}, /api/jobs/{id}/retry, and /api/jobs/{id}/skip — none of which exist. Script/EDL content is viewable via /review/render/{id}. Job status is visible via /api/stages. Testing phantom routes would require new implementation, which is out of scope for a test-only task.

design_decisions.decision: Use file-backed DB (tmp_path) rather than in-memory DB for all E2E tests
design_decisions.rationale: The create_app(db_path) factory stores db_path in app.state and routes create fresh CatalogDB connections per request. With :memory: DB, each route handler would get an empty DB. File-backed DBs ensure seeded data is visible to route handlers — matching the pattern in all existing web test files.

design_decisions.decision: Patch _event_generator for SSE tests rather than using async test client
design_decisions.rationale: The SSE endpoint uses an infinite async generator (1s poll loop). TestClient is synchronous. The established pattern in test_sse.py patches _event_generator with a finite generator that yields DB events then stops, avoiding hangs. This pattern is proven and consistent with existing tests.

design_decisions.decision: Test gate workflow as sequential approve operations rather than simulating pipeline runner
design_decisions.rationale: The full pipeline simulation test verifies the web console's gate workflow, not the orchestrator. Setting gates to 'waiting' via DB and approving via API exercises the same path a user would take. The orchestrator E2E test already exists in test_e2e.py.

reuse.how: Standard app creation for all test classes — pass tmp_path-based db_path string, returns configured FastAPI instance with all routers registered.

reuse.what: TestClient pattern from existing web tests
reuse.how: All existing web tests use starlette.testclient.TestClient with file-backed CatalogDB. Follow the same db_path→CatalogDB→create_app→TestClient fixture chain.
Reuse the exact SSE parsing logic and finite generator pattern. Patch sse_module._event_generator with a function that yields DB events then stops.

reuse.where: autopilot/db.py — insert_media, insert_run, insert_job, insert_event, init_default_gates, update_gate, insert_narrative, insert_activity_cluster, upsert_edit_plan, upsert_narrative_script, insert_upload
reuse.how: All seeding uses existing CatalogDB CRUD methods. No raw SQL needed. Wrap in helper functions with sensible defaults following _seed_narrative pattern from test_review.py.

reuse.what: Seeding helper patterns from test_review.py and test_cluster_review.py
reuse.how: Follow the defaults-with-overrides pattern: define sensible defaults dict, update with **overrides kwargs, call db.insert_X(id, **defaults). Commit after insert.
Copy the 9-element tuple constant for stage iteration in dashboard and gate tests.
Base pattern for CatalogDB creation with autocommit. E2E fixtures extend this with file-backed DB and explicit seeding.
